testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_234] Verify logging preference for ACM certificates
[NONE][CKV_AWS_233] Ensure Create before destroy for ACM certificates
[NONE][CKV_AWS_237] Ensure Create before destroy for API Gateway
[NONE][CKV2_AWS_70] Ensure API gateway method has authorization or API key set
[NONE][CKV_AWS_59] Ensure there is no open access to back-end resources through API
[NONE][CKV_AWS_217] Ensure Create before destroy for API deployments
[NONE][CKV_AWS_76] Ensure API Gateway has Access Logging enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_73] Ensure API Gateway has X-Ray Tracing enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_276] Ensure Data Trace is not enabled in API Gateway Method Settings
[NONE][CKV_AWS_308] Ensure API Gateway method setting caching is set to encrypted
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_62] Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
[NONE][CKV_AWS_63] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_259] Ensure CloudFront response header policy enforces Strict Transport Security
[NONE][CKV_AWS_305] Ensure CloudFront distribution has a default root object configured
[NONE][CKV_AWS_86] Ensure CloudFront distribution has Access Logging enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_374] Ensure AWS CloudFront web distribution has geo restriction enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_174] Verify CloudFront Distribution Viewer Certificate is using TLS v1.2 or higher
[NONE][CKV_AWS_310] Ensure CloudFront distributions should have origin failover configured
[NONE][CKV_AWS_34] Ensure CloudFront distribution ViewerProtocolPolicy is set to HTTPS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_68] CloudFront Distribution should have WAF enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_216] Ensure CloudFront distribution is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_161] Ensure RDS database has IAM authentication enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_353] Ensure that RDS instances have performance insights enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_157] Ensure that RDS instances have Multi-AZ enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_129] Ensure that respective logs of Amazon Relational Database Service (Amazon RDS) are enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_211] Ensure RDS uses a modern CaCert
[NONE][CKV_AWS_388] Ensure AWS Aurora PostgreSQL is not exposed to local file read vulnerability
[NONE][CKV_AWS_17] Ensure all data stored in RDS is not publicly accessible
[NONE][CKV_AWS_226] Ensure DB instance gets all minor upgrades automatically
[NONE][CKV_AWS_16] Ensure all data stored in the RDS is securely encrypted at rest
[NONE][CKV_AWS_250] Ensure that RDS PostgreSQL instances use a non vulnerable version with the log_fdw extension (https://aws.amazon.com/security/security-bulletins/AWS-2022-004/)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_118] Ensure that enhanced monitoring is enabled for Amazon RDS instances
[NONE][CKV_AWS_293] Ensure that AWS database instances have deletion protection enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_354] Ensure RDS Performance Insights are encrypted using KMS CMKs
[NONE][CKV_AWS_133] Ensure that RDS instances has backup policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_322] Ensure ElastiCache for Redis cache clusters have auto minor version upgrades enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_323] Ensure ElastiCache clusters do not use the default subnet group
[NONE][CKV_AWS_134] Ensure that Amazon ElastiCache Redis clusters have automatic backup turned on
[NONE][CKV_AWS_119] Ensure DynamoDB Tables are encrypted using a KMS Customer Managed CMK
[NONE][CKV_AWS_28] Ensure DynamoDB point in time recovery (backup) is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_119] Ensure DynamoDB Tables are encrypted using a KMS Customer Managed CMK
[NONE][CKV_AWS_28] Ensure DynamoDB point in time recovery (backup) is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_93] Ensure S3 bucket policy does not lockout all but root user. (Prevent lockouts needing root account fixes)
[NONE][CKV_AWS_56] Ensure S3 bucket has 'restrict_public_buckets' enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_55] Ensure S3 bucket has ignore public ACLs enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_53] Ensure S3 bucket has block public ACLS enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_54] Ensure S3 bucket has block public policy enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_300] Ensure S3 lifecycle configuration sets period for aborting failed uploads

[NONE][CKV_AWS_7] Ensure rotation for customer created CMKs is enabled
[NONE][CKV_AWS_33] Ensure KMS key policy does not contain wildcard (*) principal

[NONE][CKV_AWS_49] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions

failure.message: Ensure API Gateway caching is enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_stage.prod File: /apigateway.tf: 68-96 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-api-gateway-caching-is-enabled
68 | resource "aws_api_gateway_stage" "prod" { 69 | deployment_id = aws_api_gateway_deployment.segat.id 70 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.segat.id 71 | stage_name = var.environment 72 | 73 | # access_log_settings tambien exige el rol de CloudWatch a nivel de cuenta 74 | # (aws_api_gateway_account.main mas abajo), igual que method_settings.proxy. 75 | depends_on = [aws_api_gateway_account.main] 76 | 77 | access_log_settings { 78 | destination_arn = aws_cloudwatch_log_group.ecs.arn 79 | format = jsonencode({ 80 | requestId = "$context.requestId" 81 | ip = "$context.identity.sourceIp" 82 | caller = "$context.identity.caller" 83 | user = "$context.identity.user" 84 | requestTime = "$context.requestTime" 85 | httpMethod = "$context.httpMethod" 86 | resourcePath = "$context.resourcePath" 87 | status = "$context.status" 88 | protocol = "$context.protocol" 89 | responseLength = "$context.responseLength" 90 | }) 91 | } 92 | 93 | xray_tracing_enabled = true 94 | 95 | tags = { Name = "${var.project_name}-api-stage" } 96 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_225] Ensure API Gateway method setting caching is enabled

failure.message: Ensure API Gateway method setting caching is enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_method_settings.proxy File: /apigateway.tf: 123-135 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/ensure-aws-api-gateway-method-settings-enable-caching
123 | resource "aws_api_gateway_method_settings" "proxy" { 124 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.segat.id 125 | stage_name = aws_api_gateway_stage.prod.stage_name 126 | method_path = "*/*" 127 | 128 | settings { 129 | logging_level = "INFO" 130 | metrics_enabled = true 131 | data_trace_enabled = false 132 | } 133 | 134 | depends_on = [aws_api_gateway_account.main] 135 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_109] Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management / resource exposure without constraints

failure.message: Ensure IAM policies does not allow permissions management / resource exposure without constraints

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_111] Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints

failure.message: Ensure IAM policies does not allow write access without constraints

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_356] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_152] Ensure that Load Balancer (Network/Gateway) has cross-zone load balancing enabled

failure.message: Ensure that Load Balancer (Network/Gateway) has cross-zone load balancing enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lb.internal_nlb File: /vpc-link.tf: 54-64 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-that-load-balancer-networkgateway-has-cross-zone-load-balancing-enabled
54 | resource "aws_lb" "internal_nlb" { 55 | name = "${var.project_name}-nlb-internal" 56 | internal = true 57 | load_balancer_type = "network" 58 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.internal_nlb.id] 59 | subnets = [aws_subnet.private_a.id, aws_subnet.private_b.id] 60 | 61 | enable_deletion_protection = true 62 | 63 | tags = { Name = "${var.project_name}-nlb-internal" } 64 | }

failure.message: Ensure the ELBv2 (Application/Network) has access logging enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_lb.internal_nlb File: /vpc-link.tf: 54-64 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-logging-22
54 | resource "aws_lb" "internal_nlb" { 55 | name = "${var.project_name}-nlb-internal" 56 | internal = true 57 | load_balancer_type = "network" 58 | security_groups = [aws_security_group.internal_nlb.id] 59 | subnets = [aws_subnet.private_a.id, aws_subnet.private_b.id] 60 | 61 | enable_deletion_protection = true 62 | 63 | tags = { Name = "${var.project_name}-nlb-internal" } 64 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_stage.prod File: /apigateway.tf: 68-96 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-2-51
68 | resource "aws_api_gateway_stage" "prod" { 69 | deployment_id = aws_api_gateway_deployment.segat.id 70 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.segat.id 71 | stage_name = var.environment 72 | 73 | # access_log_settings tambien exige el rol de CloudWatch a nivel de cuenta 74 | # (aws_api_gateway_account.main mas abajo), igual que method_settings.proxy. 75 | depends_on = [aws_api_gateway_account.main] 76 | 77 | access_log_settings { 78 | destination_arn = aws_cloudwatch_log_group.ecs.arn 79 | format = jsonencode({ 80 | requestId = "$context.requestId" 81 | ip = "$context.identity.sourceIp" 82 | caller = "$context.identity.caller" 83 | user = "$context.identity.user" 84 | requestTime = "$context.requestTime" 85 | httpMethod = "$context.httpMethod" 86 | resourcePath = "$context.resourcePath" 87 | status = "$context.status" 88 | protocol = "$context.protocol" 89 | responseLength = "$context.responseLength" 90 | }) 91 | } 92 | 93 | xray_tracing_enabled = true 94 | 95 | tags = { Name = "${var.project_name}-api-stage" } 96 | }

testcase.failure:
Resource: aws_api_gateway_method.proxy File: /apigateway.tf: 28-34 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-2-53
28 | resource "aws_api_gateway_method" "proxy" { 29 | rest_api_id = aws_api_gateway_rest_api.segat.id 30 | resource_id = aws_api_gateway_resource.proxy.id 31 | http_method = "ANY" 32 | authorization = "COGNITO_USER_POOLS" 33 | authorizer_id = aws_api_gateway_authorizer.cognito.id 34 | }
